description: Fix ProjectDetail back button bug and redesign layout inspired by e-commerce product detail card (Image 3). The current layout has a sticky back button inside a fixed overflow-y-auto container that fails on mobile. The -mt-4 on carousel causes content overlap. Redesign to use a fixed/absolute back button with solid background that ALWAYS stays accessible and never gets overlapped by content.
steps: In src/sections/ProjectDetail.tsx, replace the outer layout structure. Change from 'sticky top-0 z-20' back button to a FIXED position back button at top-left with solid bg-sand background and sufficient padding/z-index (z-30) so it never gets hidden by scrolling content.
Remove the '-mt-4' from the carousel section that causes content to push up into the back button area.
Add proper top padding (pt-16 or pt-18) to the content area below the fixed back button so nothing overlaps.

Redesign the overall layout to match the e-commerce product detail pattern from Image 3: (1) Fixed back arrow at top-left with clear background, NOT overlapping content. (2) Large product/project image centered with carousel. (3) Color variant dots (carousel dots) below image. (4) Project title prominently displayed. (5) Bullet point features list. (6) Action buttons (Live Demo / Source Code) at bottom like 'Add To Cart'.

Restructure content to be SIMPLE, CLEAN, CLEARLY STRUCTURED: Back button area (fixed) -> Image carousel with dots -> Title + Category badge -> Description (short) -> Features list (bullet points) -> Tech stack -> Links/CTAs at bottom. Remove the challenge/solution/results grid for a cleaner layout, or collapse them into expandable sections.
Ensure the fixed back button has: solid bg-sand/95 backdrop-blur-md background, shadow-sm, and enough height (h-14 or similar) so it creates a proper top bar that content scrolls behind.
Keep all existing functionality: Escape key dismiss, carousel navigation, project navigation (prev/next), external links.
Ensure mobile-first responsive design - the layout must work perfectly on small screens (320px+) with touch-friendly tap targets.
acceptance_criteria: The back button is ALWAYS visible and clickable regardless of scroll position on any device
No content overlaps the back button area
The carousel images display properly without negative margins causing layout issues
The layout follows a clean top-to-bottom hierarchy: navigation -> image -> content -> actions
findings: Removed unused imports (Lightbulb, Target, BarChart3) that were only used in challenge/solution/results sections which were removed per the cleaner layout. The fixed top bar uses z-[60] to stay above the z-50 fixed overlay container. pt-18 (4.5rem) provides enough space below the h-14 (3.5rem) fixed bar. Build and TypeScript check both pass cleanly.
